s: In 2013, Onelki Garcia suited up for LAD as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 13.500, WHIP 3.750, SO 1, WAR -0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (LAD -> KCR).
In 2017, Onelki Garcia suited up for KCR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 13.500, WHIP 2.830, SO 2, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined KCR.
